description: Trait storage, TOML loading, interface resolution, and binding-aware dispatch

features.name: Trait loading from disk
features.description: Registry loads .trait.toml files from a directory and registers them

tests.name: load_from_dir registers all traits in directory
loaded traits are queryable by path

features.name: Builtin trait embedding
features.description: Compile-time builtins are loaded even without filesystem traits

features.name: Type parsing
features.description: parse_type converts string representations to TraitType enum

tests.name: unit tests cover primitives, generics, and optionals
tests.command: cd "$PWD" && cargo test --bin traits -- registry::tests::test_parse_type 2>&1 | tail -5

features.name: Language parsing
features.description: parse_language converts string names to Language enum with aliases

tests.name: unit tests cover all languages and unknown input
tests.command: cd "$PWD" && cargo test --bin traits -- registry::tests::test_parse_language 2>&1 | tail -5

features.name: Not-found returns None
features.description: Registry.get returns None for unregistered paths

tests.name: unit test for empty registry
tests.command: cd "$PWD" && cargo test --bin traits -- registry::tests::test_registry_basic 2>&1 | tail -5

tests.name: CLI returns error for nonexistent trait

features.name: Namespace filtering (via sys.registry trait)
features.description: Traits can be filtered by namespace prefix

tests.name: sys namespace returns all sys.* traits

features.name: Search (via sys.registry trait)
features.description: Traits can be searched by path or description substring

tests.name: search finds traits by path substring
search finds traits by description substring

features.name: Reload
features.description: Registry can be reloaded from disk at runtime
